_meta.title: Sync Configuration for GitHub Skill Organizer
_meta.name: github-skill-organizer
_meta.description: Unified configuration: sync rules, version bump policies, upload gate checks, workstation defaults, exclusion rules, error codes, and script profiles. v1.0.3 added repo_issue_finder + issue_extractor profiles.

patch.description: Typo fixes, path corrections, minor frontmatter updates

minor.description: Feature additions, multi-file refactoring, new dependencies

major.description: Breaking changes, skill merges, architecture shifts

global_excludes.description: All scripts share these base exclusion rules. NOTE: Removed '.' prefix to prevent false positives on .workbuddy/.config directories.

skill_uploader.description: Upload profile: requires parent-directory recursion + base_path boundary to prevent .workbuddy false exclusion

file_scouter.description: Scan profile: checks file itself only, no parent recursion

repo_skill_migrator.description: Repo migration profile: scans skill directory files

version_manager.description: Version management profile: scans skill directory files

repo_issue_finder.description: Issue download profile: pure data fetcher, no local file operations

issue_extractor.description: Issue analysis profile: scans local skills, no GitHub API calls

PARAM_MISSING_SKILL_NAME.hint: Provide skill directory name, e.g. skill_name='github-skill-organizer'
PARAM_MISSING_SKILL_NAME.fix_action: Check local_dir path and confirm directory name

PARAM_INVALID_FILES.reason: File path does not exist or cannot be resolved
PARAM_INVALID_FILES.hint: Provide absolute path or path relative to USER_SKILLS_FOLDER
PARAM_INVALID_FILES.fix_action: Check path correctness, both Path() and str are accepted

CLASSIFICATION_INCOMPLETE.hint: Pass compare_skill() return value directly, system auto-calls change_classifier
CLASSIFICATION_INCOMPLETE.fix_action: No need to manually call classify_change(), auto-complete is built-in

EXCLUDE_ALL_FILES.reason: All files blocked by exclusion rules
EXCLUDE_ALL_FILES.fix_action: Verify global_excludes.prefixes does not contain '.', or adjust script_profiles boundary

CLI_NOT_FOUND.hint: Confirm github-restful-api-connector skill installed at DEPENDENCY_SKILL_PATH
CLI_NOT_FOUND.fix_action: Install dependency skill and verify DEPENDENCY_SKILL_PATH in .env

CLEAN_DIR_EMPTY.reason: Clean temp directory is empty after exclusion
CLEAN_DIR_EMPTY.hint: All files excluded by _is_excluded_path, check base_path_boundary setting

FRONTMATTER_MISSING.hint: Use skill_files_designer to regenerate files with frontmatter
FRONTMATTER_MISSING.fix_action: Add unified frontmatter to file, or move it out of skill directory
